title: 8.06.2026 — Nika, Day 4
paragraphs: The next morning we reached Latvia, where we refueled and bought cigarettes. Then we headed out into the open sea, since it's a more direct route to Hel than hugging the Kaliningrad coast. The evening and night were calm. I stood another night watch, but by morning I was dead on my feet; neither coffee nor cigarettes helped. The open horizon is a powerful lullaby!
But in the morning... I'd better tell that in the next chapter)))
